nasb.text: And His mother and brothers came to Him, and they were unable to get to Him because of the crowd.

esv.text: Then his mother and his brothers came to him, but they could not reach him because of the crowd.

cnv.text: 耶穌的母親和弟弟來到他那裡，因為人多，不能到他跟前。

ccb.text: 这时，耶稣的母亲和兄弟来找祂，由于人太多，他们无法靠近耶稣，

csbs.text: 耶稣的母亲和弟弟们来到他那里，可是由于人多，不能靠近他。
